contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">All registered tasks and workflows</span></span>"' data-data='"[{\"name\":\"samtools_faidx\",\"description\":\"Create a FASTA index (.fai file) using samtools faidx.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"create_sequence_dictionary\",\"description\":\"Create a sequence dictionary (.dict file) using GATK CreateSequenceDictionary.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_index\",\"description\":\"Create BWA index files for a reference genome using bwa index.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem\",\"description\":\"Align FASTQ reads to reference genome using BWA-MEM.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference, r1: R1, r2: R2 | NoneType, read_group: dict[str, str] | NoneType\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem2_index\",\"description\":\"Create BWA-MEM2 index files for a reference genome.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem2_mem\",\"description\":\"Align FASTQ reads to reference genome using BWA-MEM2.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference, r1: R1, r2: R2 | NoneType, read_group: dict[str, str] | NoneType\"},{\"name\":\"sort_sam\",\"description\":\"Sort a SAM/BAM file.\",\"params\":\"alignment: Alignment, sort_order: str\"},{\"name\":\"mark_duplicates\",\"description\":\"Mark duplicate reads in a BAM file.\",\"params\":\"alignment: Alignment\"},{\"name\":\"merge_bam_alignment\",\"description\":\"Merge alignment data from aligned BAM with data in unmapped BAM.\",\"params\":\"aligned_bam: Alignment, unmapped_bam: Alignment, ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"index_feature_file\",\"description\":\"Index a VCF file data.text/markdown:
Stargazer — scRNA-seq Explorer

Walk through the single-cell clustering pipeline step by step. Each section runs a Stargazer task and visualizes the result. Adjust parameters with the controls and re-run cells to iterate.
